examples.text: لُعْبَةٌ مُسْتَقِلَّةٌ هِيَ لُعْبَةٌ يَتِمُّ إِنْشَاؤُهَا مِنْ قِبَلِ فَرْدٍ أَوْ فَرِيقٍ صَغِيرٍ مِنْ دُونِ وُجُودِ دَعْمٍ مَالِيٍّ مِنْ نَاشِرِ أَلْعَابِ فِيدِيُو.
examples.english: An indie game is a video game created by an individual or a small team without the financial support of a game publisher.

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of اِسْتَقَلَّ (istaqalla, “to be independent”).
